title: The law graduates who cleared UPSC 2025 exam
description: At least 14 law graduates have cracked the Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) Civil Service Examinations, 2025.Ishan Bhatnagar, a 2023 graduate of National Law University Delhi (NLU Delhi), has secured All India Rank 5.Prateek Mudgal, a graduate of Aligarh Muslim University (AMU), has secured All India Rank 54. Rishabh Yadav, a 2023 graduate of Dr Ram Manohar Lohia National Law University (RMLNLU) Lucknow, has secured All India Rank 132.Anindya Pandey, a graduate of University of Allahabad,
